title: Help From Hexxy
description: Ever wanted your mishaps relayed to you by Hexxy themselves? Well now you can!
body:
# Help From Hexxy

Now you too can get advice on your mistakes from Hexxy themselves!

Or just make them say random stuff lmao


# Features
An Inline matcher to make hexxy say a thing \
Used via Inlines standard matchers, the keyword is "deaqq" ex. [deaqq:hello there], [deaqq+oops] \
![hexxy talks about ovens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUqaq0aE/images/8560ecf0541fcd52755313c43a26f15309baf822.webp)

Adds many emoji's from the hexcasting discord:
- :hexxy: - original by `clockworkvulpine`
- :weedhexxy: - original by `beholderface`
- :fluxxy: - also by `beholderface`
- :clueless:
- :cluedin:
- :I_Use_WispOS_Btw:
- :psexxy:
- :concern:
- :widexxy:
- :irissy: - orginal by `rose`
- :quadxxy: - original by `DaComputerNerd`
- :amethyst_cherish - original by `abyst_`
- :widexxy_left: - all widexxy parts by `jesseisstuckinside`
- :widexxy_left_eye:
- :widexxy_left_eye_weed:
- :widexxy_center:
- :widexxy_right_eye_weed:
- :widexxy_right_eye:
- :widexxy_right:
  
(all manually pixelated by yours truly (except concern, I just downscaled that one))

![All currently included emojis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUqaq0aE/images/40da7d954887d6a83960f480e162a2c8f685db3f.webp)


(thats literally the entire mod)
